Class cube.database.IdEnumeration 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----cube.database.IdEnumeration
public class IdEnumeration
extends Object
implements Enumeration
The IdEnumeration class creates an Enumeration on an array of Ids. It creates an enumeration for an IdList.

For more information on the cube see the cube Overview.

See Also:
IdList

IdEnumeration(Id[])
Construct an IdEnumeration from an array of Ids.

hasMoreElements()
Does this enumeration have more elements?
nextElement()
Retrieve the next Id

IdEnumeration 
  public IdEnumeration(Id p[])
Construct an IdEnumeration from an array of Ids.

Parameters:
p - - array of Ids

nextElement 
  public Object nextElement()
Retrieve the next Id

hasMoreElements 
  public boolean hasMoreElements()
Does this enumeration have more elements?
